subcodes.first_line: O thou who worshipest God, learn servitude from 'Abdu'l-Bahá, who night and day is engaged in servitude to the servants of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعبد لله عبودیت را از عبدالبهاء بیاموز که شب و روز بعبودیت بندگان بهاء
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
